title: About Herb Approach
intro: Canada's trusted online dispensary specializing in Mail Order Marijuana since 2017. Lab-tested, discreetly delivered, and backed by our satisfaction guarantee.

sections.heading: Our Mission
sections.content: We believe every Canadian adult should have access to premium, lab-tested cannabis products delivered safely and discreetly to their door. Herb Approach exists to provide the highest quality cannabis experience with unmatched customer service.

sections.heading: Quality Promise
sections.content: Every product in our catalogue is sourced from BC's top licensed producers and rigorously lab-tested for potency, purity, and safety. We maintain strict quality standards and only stock products that meet our exacting criteria.

sections.heading: Serving All of Canada
sections.content: We ship to all provinces and territories across Canada via Canada Post Xpresspost. Orders over $150 qualify for free shipping, and every order is vacuum-sealed in discreet packaging to protect your privacy.
